test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that a new author can be created with valid name, bio, and born_year.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verify that creating an author without a name returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verify that an existing author can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verify that retrieving a non-existent author returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verify that a conditional GET with a matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that an author can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verify that updating an author with a mismatched ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verify that an author with no associated books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books
test_cases.description: Verify that deleting an author with associated books returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that a new book can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verify that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verify that an existing book can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verify that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that a book can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a book can be soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a soft-deleted book can be restored.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that restoring a non-deleted book returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_ineligible_book
test_cases.description: Verify that applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verify that exceeding the rate limit for discounts returns 429 Too Many Requests.

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verify that a book's stock can be updated with a valid quantity.

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_to_negative_value
test_cases.description: Verify that updating a book's stock to a negative value returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify that a valid cover image can be uploaded for a book.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_cover_image_type
test_cases.description: Verify that uploading an unsupported file type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type.

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verify that uploading a file larger than 2 MB returns 413 Content Too Large.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verify that a review can be created for an existing book.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verify that creating a review for a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: get_rating_for_book_with_reviews
test_cases.description: Verify that the average rating for a book with reviews can be retrieved.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verify that multiple books can be created in bulk with valid data.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verify that exceeding the rate limit for bulk creation returns 429 Too Many Requests.
